Title: Basic Country Search - Single Character
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on COUNTRY dropdown
2. Enter "A" in search field
3. Verify filtered results
Expected Result: Dropdown opens with search field. List filters to show countries containing "A" (Australia, Canada, Japan, Malaysia, South Africa). Only matching countries are displayed.

Title: Country Search - Multiple Characters
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on COUNTRY dropdown
2. Enter "United" in search field
3. Verify exact matches appear first
Expected Result: Dropdown opens. List filters to show "United Kingdom" and "United States of America". Matching countries are displayed with count badges.

Title: Country Search - Case Insensitivity
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on COUNTRY dropdown
2. Enter "DENMARK" in uppercase
3. Clear and enter "denmark" in lowercase
4. Clear and enter "DeNmArK" in mixed case
Expected Result: Denmark is displayed in results for all case variations. Search is case-insensitive.

Title: Country Search - No Results
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on COUNTRY dropdown
2. Enter "XYZ123" (non-existent country)
3. Verify the message styling
Expected Result: "No results" message is displayed clearly and is user-friendly.

Title: Country Search - Clear Search Text
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on COUNTRY dropdown
2. Enter "K" in search field
3. Clear the search field (backspace/delete)
4. Verify all countries are visible
Expected Result: List filters to Denmark, United Kingdom. After clearing, full country list is restored. All available countries are displayed.

Title: Country Search - Special Characters
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on COUNTRY dropdown
2. Enter special characters (!, @, #, $)
3. Enter spaces only
Expected Result: No crash occurs. Shows "No results" or handles gracefully.

Title: Basic State/Province Search
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on STATE / PROVINCE dropdown
2. Enter "New" in search field
3. Verify filtered results
Expected Result: Dropdown opens with search field and state list. List filters to show states containing "New" (New York, New Jersey, etc.). Only matching states are displayed with count badges.

Title: State Search After Country Selection
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Select "United States of America" in Country filter
2. Click on STATE / PROVINCE dropdown
3. Enter "Cal" in search field
4. Verify filtered list
Expected Result: Country filter is applied. Only US states are shown. California is displayed. Only US states matching "Cal" are shown.

Title: Basic City Search
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on CITY dropdown
2. Enter "New" in search field
3. Verify filtered results
Expected Result: Dropdown opens with search field and city list. List filters to show cities containing "New" (New York, Newark, etc.). Matching cities are displayed with count badges.

Title: City Search - Partial Match
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on CITY dropdown
2. Enter "York" in search field
3. Verify partial matching works
Expected Result: New York is displayed in results. Cities containing "York" anywhere in the name are shown.

Title: Search Text Retention After Switching Filters (BUG)
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on COUNTRY dropdown
2. Enter "K" in search field
3. Click on CITY dropdown
4. Select "New York"
5. Click on COUNTRY dropdown again
Expected Result: Country dropdown should show "United States of America" (the only applicable country). BUG: Currently shows "No results" because "K" search text is retained.

Title: Search Text Should Clear When Filter is Applied
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on COUNTRY dropdown
2. Enter "Can" in search field
3. Select "Canada" checkbox
4. Click on COUNTRY dropdown again
Expected Result: Canada is displayed after search. Filter is applied. Search field should be empty, showing only selected/applicable countries.

Title: Multiple Filter Combination with Search
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Select "United States of America" in Country
2. Click on STATE / PROVINCE dropdown
3. Enter "New" and select "New York"
4. Click on CITY dropdown
5. Enter "Brook" in city search
6. Verify all filters work together
Expected Result: All filters apply correctly. Brooklyn is displayed in results. Pickup points list shows only Brooklyn, NY, USA locations.

Title: Filter Reset Should Clear All Search Text
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open, Multiple filters applied
Steps:
1. Apply multiple filters with search text in each
2. Click "Reset filters" button
3. Open each dropdown (Country, State, City)
4. Verify full lists are displayed
Expected Result: All filters are cleared. Search fields are empty in all dropdowns. All options are available without filtering.

Title: Search Text Persistence Within Same Session
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on COUNTRY dropdown
2. Enter "Aus" in search field
3. Close dropdown (click outside)
4. Open COUNTRY dropdown again
Expected Result: Australia is displayed during search. Dropdown closes. Search field state should be defined (either cleared or retained with clear UX).

Title: Search Field Placeholder Text
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on COUNTRY dropdown
2. Click on STATE / PROVINCE dropdown
3. Click on CITY dropdown
Expected Result: "Search Country" placeholder visible. "Search State" or similar placeholder visible. "Search City" placeholder visible.

Title: Search Field Focus State
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on any filter dropdown
2. Observe search field
3. Start typing
Expected Result: Dropdown opens. Search field should be auto-focused for immediate typing. Characters appear without clicking on search field.

Title: Search Results Count Display
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on COUNTRY dropdown
2. Enter search term
3. Verify counts reflect available pickup points
Expected Result: Countries shown with count badges (e.g., "Canada (2)"). Filtered results show accurate count badges. Numbers match actual pickup points.

Title: Search Response Time
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Click on COUNTRY dropdown
2. Type characters quickly
3. Verify no UI freezing
Expected Result: Dropdown opens within 500ms. Search filters results in real-time without lag. Interface remains responsive.

Title: Large Dataset Search
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Open CITY dropdown (largest dataset)
2. Enter single character search
3. Scroll through results
Expected Result: All cities load without significant delay. Filtering completes within 300ms. Smooth scrolling without lag.

Title: Keyboard Navigation in Search
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open
Steps:
1. Tab to COUNTRY dropdown and press Enter
2. Type search term
3. Use Arrow keys to navigate results
4. Press Enter to select
5. Press Escape
Expected Result: Dropdown opens. Text is entered in search field. Focus moves through filtered options. Option is selected. Dropdown closes.

Title: Screen Reader Compatibility
Preconditions: User is logged in, Cart has items, Pickup selected, Pick points modal open, Screen reader enabled
Steps:
1. Navigate to filter dropdown with screen reader
2. Enter search text
3. Navigate filtered results
4. Trigger "No results" scenario
Expected Result: Dropdown role and name are announced. Search field and current value are announced. Each option is announced with count. "No results" message is announced.
